description_cn: 将刚体根据指定的轴吸附到一起。
description_en: The rigid bodies are attracted together along the specified axis.

parameters.name: PlaneA
parameters.desc_en: The frame of one rigid body

parameters.name: PlaneB
parameters.desc_en: The frame of the other rigid body

parameters.name: AxisA
parameters.desc_en: The axis of the first body

parameters.name: AxisB
parameters.desc_en: The axis of the other body

parameters.name: Flip
parameters.desc_en: Reverse the relative direction of the axes

author: Kangaroo Team
